message:
fix(eval): substitute outer column refs in correlated EXISTS/subqueries (#86)

eval_expr_with_subqueries and inline_subqueries_in_expr now call
substitute_outer_refs_in_select before executing correlated subqueries,
fixing cases where EXISTS/scalar subqueries reference outer row columns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
